arabic_text:
کرۃ النار
حرارت + یبوست
کرۃ الھوا
حرارت + رطوبت
کرۃ النسیم
برودت + رطوبت ❀معتدل❀
کرۃ الأرض
برودت + یبوست
کرۃ المآء
برودت + رطوبت
english_text:
Sphere of Fire — Extreme Heat + Extreme Dryness
Sphere of Air — Moderate Heat + Moderate Moisture
Sphere of Breeze — Moderate Cold + Moderate Moisture (Equilibrium)
Sphere of Earth — Moderate Cold + Moderate Dryness
Sphere of Water — Moderate Cold + Moderate Moisture
alt_text: Extension of image 010: the four-element qualitative table now expanded to include a third row for the Sphere of Breeze (کرۃ النسیم), highlighted yellow with a 'معتدل' (moderate/equilibrium) flourish, characterised as Moderate Cold + Moderate Moisture. The Earth row is also highlighted yellow.
notes: Refines the four-element scheme of image 010 by inserting the Sphere of Breeze (Nasim) between Fire/Air and Water/Earth as a fifth equilibrium sphere. The yellow highlight on the Breeze sphere identifies it as the temperate / equilibrium zone where life can flourish.
